calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hee Sun Kim for and with Petitioner Lisamarie C. Rocco.

Ms. Kim stated that the nature of assets of the trust had changed not because of any action taken by the trustee, but because of changes in the business entities by merger. She stated that the beneficiary of the trust is the only heir, who is in bad health. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse. (Not reported)
